checklist.detail: 4 file(s) changed: internal/discovery/generic.go, internal/discovery/scanner_test.go, internal/engine/language_tiers.go, internal/engine/language_tiers_test.go
checklist.label: Change is visible

checklist.detail: the project verify command was GREEN
checklist.label: Verification passed

checklist.detail: committed locally on the build branch
checklist.label: Work committed

checklist.detail: Core requirements all met: Tier enum, registry, TierForLanguage, and all 3 required tests (dynamic KnownLanguages loop, unknown→Generic, Swift→Generic). Discovery changes (KnownLanguages()) were not listed as target files but directly enable the plan's mandate to 'iterate all known language IDs from discovery' — reasonable supporting work.
checklist.label: Implements the approved plan

checklist.detail: Plan listed 2 target files; build touched 4. Extra discovery changes are small (48 lines, one utility + one test), directly serve the plan's objective, and contain zero unrelated churn.
checklist.label: Minimal and scoped

checklist.detail: Test iterates discovery.KnownLanguages() dynamically — any new language without a tier entry will fail CI. No hardcoded expected values to force green. Swift explicitly checked as TierGeneric. Unknown-language fail-safe verified. No test weakening or deletion.
checklist.label: No test-gaming / faking

checklist.detail: All changes additive only. KnownLanguages() is read-only. Tier registry has no side effects. Tests are guardrails, not risks. No correctness, security, or regression concerns.
checklist.label: Safe to advance

checklist.detail: at or above the confidence bar
checklist.label: Judge confidence

dimensions.evidence: Core requirements all met: Tier enum, registry, TierForLanguage, and all 3 required tests (dynamic KnownLanguages loop, unknown→Generic, Swift→Generic). Discovery changes (KnownLanguages()) were not listed as target files but directly enable the plan's mandate to 'iterate all known language IDs from discovery' — reasonable supporting work.
Plan listed 2 target files; build touched 4. Extra discovery changes are small (48 lines, one utility + one test), directly serve the plan's objective, and contain zero unrelated churn.

Test iterates discovery.KnownLanguages() dynamically — any new language without a tier entry will fail CI. No hardcoded expected values to force green. Swift explicitly checked as TierGeneric. Unknown-language fail-safe verified. No test weakening or deletion.
